expected_subtasks.title: Research SAML and OAuth2 SSO requirements
expected_subtasks.description: Document protocol requirements for each IdP

expected_subtasks.title: Design SSO architecture
expected_subtasks.description: Design authentication flow and data model

expected_subtasks.title: Implement SAML integration
expected_subtasks.description: Build SAML assertion handling and validation

expected_subtasks.title: Implement OAuth2 integration
expected_subtasks.description: Build OAuth2 flow for each IdP

expected_subtasks.title: Test with each identity provider
expected_subtasks.description: Verify Okta, Azure AD, and Google Workspace

expected_subtasks.title: Write admin documentation
expected_subtasks.description: Document SSO setup for enterprise admins

what_good_breakdown_looks_like: 5-6 subtasks covering research, design, SAML, OAuth2, testing, docs.
acceptable_variation: May have 5-7 subtasks. Must cover both SAML and OAuth2 separately.
notes: Complex security task. Must separate SAML and OAuth2 implementations.
